intentSynonyms: show me my env vars in netlify
view my env vars in netlify
see all my env vars in netlify
description: List all environment variables for a Netlify account. Optionally scope to a specific site. Returns variable names, scopes, context-specific values, and secret status.

account_id.description: The account ID to list environment variables for

site_id.description: Optional site ID to scope variables to a specific site
